sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46370" key="zumwtiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῡμ-ωτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n46370.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">causing to ferment</tr_>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τινος</itype> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0664.tlg001:118" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diocl.Fr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">118</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
